programme.title: Barnwood Builders

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage team works at the Noland Sign Company in Roanoke, Va.; on a windy day, the crew salvages metal lettering, copper cupolas and vintage plumbing; Grayson buys an initial machine for the shop.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs
programme.desc: The team heads back to snowy Ellwood City, Pa., to salvage the rectory of St. Agatha's Catholic Church; they take a tour of the Bally Block Factory where Robert's grandfather used to work.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs
programme.desc: In Greencastle, Pa., the crew salvages an old church that is being restored and turned into a physical therapy office; the team struggles to figure out the best way to remove the windows, salvage the large bell and execute an idea for a console.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs
programme.desc: The crew travels to Pennsylvania to save what it can from Esther Ludwig's mansion before it gets demolished, hoping to reclaim some of the mansion's original items, such as chandeliers, built-ins and mantles; Mike buys an old vintage wheelchair.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs
programme.desc: The crew members go to Wayne Lanes in Waynesboro, Va., to salvage bowling balls, bowling pins, bowling shoes, and whatever else they can find in the alley; Robert is determined to redeem himself from last season's bowling fiasco.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs
programme.desc: The crew members return to the Ludwig mansion in Pennsylvania; they focus on the outside of the house including the roof tiles, windows and boiler room; Tay races to take out the casement windows, while Mike and Ted try to salvage the roof tiles.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A Missouri couple who have inherited property are now cleaning it up and building it out, but troubles multiply as hurricane rains flood the buildsite, a gigantic burn pile creates larger flames than expected, and materials arrive broken.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid

programme.title: Building Off the Grid

programme.desc: The Cordrays renovate Michael's childhood brick bungalow for his supportive mom; they add a new fireplace, handmade window treatments, upgraded kitchen hardware and a surprise.
